block_00: Dropbox set to report Q1 earnings.
block_01: Will DBX stock rise in price?
block_02: The cloud storage giant will report Q1 earnings on May 10th after market close. Will the stock sink or soar the following day?
block_04: Dropbox Inc. stock performance courtesy of
block_06: This is Dropbox’s first earnings report since becoming a publicly traded company. Investors will be watching the results hawkishly, trying to gauge the company’s long-term profit capabilities.
block_07: If the published figures don’t meet Wall Street expectations, the price of DBX stock may go down. Will you turn this occasion into a trading opportunity?
block_09: *Past performance is not a reliable indicator of future results.
